description: You are a science curriculum developer at the Education Innovation Institute evaluating GCompris's science and experiment activities for alignment with Next Generation Science Standards (NGSS). Evaluate at least three different science experiment activities in GCompris, covering topics such as physics (e.g., Gravity, Watercycle) and color/optics (e.g., Mixing paint colors, Mixing light colors). For each activity, assess the scientific concept demonstrated, the intended grade level, and the accuracy of the scientific model. Compile your findings into an NGSS Curriculum Alignment Report at ~/Desktop/science_curriculum_report.txt. The report must list the evaluated activities, their scientific concepts (e.g., fluid dynamics, color theory, light physics), suggested grade bands (K-2, 3-5, 6-8), and an overall recommendation for classroom use. Login: ga / password123

metadata.occupation: Science Curriculum Developer / NGSS Alignment Specialist
